en_title: Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 Sets Fall 2026 Release With First Look at 4 New Characters
cn_title: 《赛博朋克：边缘行者2》定档2026年秋季，四名新角色曝光
subtitle: 夜之城又有新故事
opus_summary: Netflix释出《赛博朋克：边缘行者2》首批角色设定与2026年秋季档期，四位新成员Weak Kingsley、D、Roman Carax与Talia。

paragraphs.en: Netflix has revealed first character details and a fall release window for its anime sequel series, Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 .
paragraphs.cn: Netflix公布了其动画续集系列《赛博朋克：边缘行者2》的首批角色详情与秋季播出窗口。

paragraphs.en: Netflix, CD Projekt Red, and Studio Trigger took to X/Twitter to roll out information about the new cast of characters coming to Season 2 of the Cyberpunk 2077 anime spin-off. It came with the promise of a fall 2026 release window, narrowing down its premiere timeline as fans await a more specific release date.
paragraphs.cn: Netflix、CDPR和扳机社在X/Twitter上公布了《赛博朋克2077》动画衍生剧第二季的全新角色阵容，并锁定2026年秋季的播出窗口。这让等待的期限稍微清晰了一点，不过粉丝仍在期待一个更具体的上线日期。

paragraphs.en: Meanwhile, the announcement came with a sneak peek at four new characters: Weak Kingsley , D , Roman Carax , and Talia Yang . The new gang graces the cover of the first Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 poster, which you can see below.
paragraphs.cn: 与此同时，本次发布还抢先展示了四位新角色：Weak Kingsley、D、Roman Carax和Talia Yang。这个新团伙登上了《赛博朋克：边缘行者2》首张海报的封面，你可以在下方看到。

paragraphs.en: Netflix published information about the four new Night City names across social media and in collaboration with various content creators. As shared via Crunchyroll , Weak Kingsley is described as a veteran Edgerunner who "now lives in the shadow of his former glory." D is a Snack Nation Netrunner looking for revenge as he "hunts the killer who wiped out his clan."
paragraphs.cn: Netflix在社交媒体上，并与多位内容创作者合作，公布了这四位夜之城新人的详细资料。据Crunchyroll转发，Weak Kingsley被描述为一名资深边缘行者，「如今活在了昔日荣光的阴影之下」。D则是一名Snack Nation的网络行者，为了给「被灭门的族人复仇」而追杀凶手。

paragraphs.en: Roman Carax is the youngest of the group and is described as a "cinephile in search of real stories in a city that abandoned cinema for braindances." Finally, there's Talia Yang, an individual with corpo and Maelstrom ties whose "heart belongs to chrome and violence."
paragraphs.cn: Roman Carax是四人中最年轻的，被形容为「一名影迷，在一座遗弃电影、拥抱超梦的城市里寻找真实的故事」。最后还有Talia Yang，她同时与公司势力和漩涡帮有瓜葛，「内心只属于义体和暴力」。

paragraphs.en: Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 is directed by Kai Ikarashi, with character designs handled by Kanno Ichigo. Original writers Bartosz Sztybor and Masahiko Otsuka are also back to work on Netflix and Trigger's sequel show.
paragraphs.cn: 《赛博朋克：边缘行者2》由Kai Ikarashi执导，角色设计由Kanno Ichigo负责。原编剧Bartosz Sztybor和大塚雅彦也回归Netflix与扳机社联合制作的这部续集。

paragraphs.en: Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 was officially announced in July of last year with a brief teaser trailer (above), which, if you look closely, seems to feature some of the characters featured in today's poster. A new teaser trailer will be revealed tomorrow at 8:30 a.m. PT / 11:30 a.m. ET, but don't expect a firm release date for at least a little while longer.
paragraphs.cn: 《赛博朋克：边缘行者2》于去年七月正式公布，并释出了一支简短的先导预告（上文所示）。仔细看的话，预告里似乎出现了今天海报中的部分角色。新一支预告片将于太平洋时间明天上午8:30/东部时间上午11:30（北京时间明晚23:30）发布，但暂时还不会有确切的播出日期。

paragraphs.en: "Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 presents a new standalone 10-episode story from the world of Cyberpunk 2077— a raw chronicle of redemption and revenge," an official description for Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 says. "In a city that thrives in the spotlight of violence, one question remains: when the world is blinded by spectacle, what extremes do you have to go to make your story matter?"
paragraphs.cn: 《赛博朋克：边缘行者2》的官方简介写道：「《赛博朋克：边缘行者2》将带来一段发生在《赛博朋克2077》世界中的全新独立十集故事—— 一部关于救赎与复仇的粗粝纪实。在一个迷失于暴力聚光灯下的城市里，一个问题始终萦绕：当世界被奇观所蒙蔽，你要做到怎样极致，才能让你的故事被人铭记？」

paragraphs.en: We don't know much about the plot of Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2, but given the events of Season 1 , most fans are already expecting the worst for this new cast of misfits. For more on the world of Cyberpunk 2077, you can read about .
paragraphs.cn: 关于《赛博朋克：边缘行者2》的具体剧情我们知之甚少，但考虑到第一季的走向，大多数粉丝已经为这群新的边缘人做好了最坏的打算。若想进一步了解《赛博朋克2077》的世界，你可以阅读……
